meta.purpose: Agent-queryable index of GitHub repos and skills relevant to Logos project stack. Fetch this file, match use_when fields against your project description, then install or reference the relevant repos.
meta.usage_instruction: POST this JSON + your project description to an LLM: 'Given project: [X], which repos in this index are most relevant? Return IDs and install commands.'

logos_stack_context.constraint: No cloud dependencies, free-tier APIs only, local-first
active_tranches: T3 Date Curator Utah County events

repos.name: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
repos.description: Karpathy-derived CLAUDE.md guidelines: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution.
use_when: setting up any Claude Code project

repos.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
repos.description: Persistent memory across Claude sessions. Auto-captures and injects codebase context.
use_when: re-teaching Claude your codebase each session
any Logos tranche with complex state

repos.name: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
repos.description: Curated list of Claude Code skills, hooks, slash commands, orchestrators, and tools.
use_when: discovering available Claude Code community tools

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.description: Forces structured thinking before coding: brainstorm, plan, isolated branches, TDD, review.
use_when: reducing costly mistakes on complex work

repos.name: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
repos.description: Full agent harness with skills, instincts, security scanning, multi-language coverage.

repos.name: FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
repos.description: Comprehensive docs, production-ready templates, quizzes, agentic workflow guides.

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.description: Production-grade SKILL.md files by Addy Osmani (Google Chrome). Full dev lifecycle: spec, plan, build, test, review, ship.
use_when: before starting any T2 or T4 build phase

repos.name: VRSEN/agency-swarm
repos.description: Python multi-agent orchestration framework. Requires OpenAI API — not Claude-native.
repos.caveat: OpenAI API required — not compatible with local-first Logos constraint without OpenRouter

repos.name: msitarzewski/agency-agents
repos.description: Trending March 2026. Agent-based automation framework. Not yet fetched.

repos.name: czlonkowski/n8n-mcp
repos.description: MCP server giving Claude Code access to 1396+ n8n workflow automation nodes.
repos.caveat: Cloud-dependent for hosted n8n; self-hostable with Docker

repos.name: googleapis/mcp-toolbox
repos.description: Google MCP server for databases. Connects Claude Code directly to SQLite, Postgres, MongoDB via tools.yaml.
use_when: Claude Code needs to query SQLite databases directly
T1 WCS database queries from agent

repos.name: jackwener/opencli
repos.description: Turn any website into CLI by reusing Chrome login session. AI discovers APIs, generates YAML adapters.
use_when: scraping sites you are already logged into
building CLI wrappers around web apps

repos.name: alexpate/awesome-design-systems
repos.description: 100+ real-world design systems: Adobe Spectrum, IBM Carbon, Shopify Polaris, GitHub Primer, Vercel.

repos.name: bradtraversy/design-resources-for-developers
repos.description: Curated design and UI resources: color tools, fonts, icons, stock photos, UI libraries.
use_when: UI resource discovery for any front-end build

repos.name: firecrawl/firecrawl
repos.description: Turn any URL into LLM-ready markdown. Handles JS-rendered pages, anti-bot, dynamic content.
use_when: T3 Date Curator scraping Eventbrite or UtahValley.com
any site that blocks standard scrapers
converting web content to LLM context
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — solves T3 JS-rendered scraping blocker directly

repos.name: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
repos.description: Official Google MCP server giving Claude Code full Chrome DevTools access via your real Chrome browser. 29 tools: click, type, fill forms, navigate, screenshot, network inspection, performance traces, Lighthouse audit, evaluate JS. Uses your actual cookies and login sessions.
use_when: scraping sites you are already logged into
T3 Eventbrite or UtahValley.com with existing login
agent needs to click through pages
any browser interaction task from Claude Code
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — uses your real Chrome session, solves login/auth scraping problem across T1 and T3
repos.install: claude mcp add chrome-devtools --scope user npx chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
repos.caveat: Requires Chrome to be open. Not a background headless scraper — agent works in your actual browser.

repos.description: Anti-detection headless browser server for AI agents. Camoufox (Firefox fork) spoof fingerprints at C++ level — WebGL, AudioContext, WebRTC, hardwareConcurrency. REST API with accessibility snapshots 90% smaller than HTML. Session isolation, search macros, Docker-ready.
use_when: T3 escalation when standard scrapers fail
agent needs to fill forms or click through pages
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — T3 escalation layer above Firecrawl for hardened anti-bot sites
repos.install: git clone https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser && npm install && npm start
repos.caveat: Built for OpenClaw originally; REST server is standalone and usable from any agent. ~300MB Camoufox download on first run.

repos.name: D4Vinci/Scrapling
repos.description: Adaptive Python scraping framework. Handles single requests to full crawls. StealthyFetcher bypasses Cloudflare Turnstile. Adaptive element tracking survives redesigns. Scrapy-like spider API with pause/resume, async, multi-session. Built-in MCP server for Claude.
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — Python-native, MCP server for Claude, T3 primary scraping solution

repos.name: daijro/camoufox
repos.description: Firefox fork with C++ anti-detection fingerprint spoofing. Engine behind Scrapling StealthyFetcher and camofox-browser. Playwright API compatible.
use_when: need raw browser engine with anti-detection
sites that defeat all other tools
repos.logos_relevance: MEDIUM — use Scrapling or camofox-browser wrappers instead of raw camoufox
repos.install: pip install camoufox && python -m camoufox fetch
repos.caveat: Maintenance gap in 2025 — under re-development 2026. Use Scrapling's StealthyFetcher as the stable wrapper.

repos.name: 666ghj/MiroFish
repos.description: Trending March 2026. Not yet fetched.

repos.name: donnemartin/system-design-primer
repos.description: Definitive system design reference. Scale, load balancers, caching, databases, CAP theorem.

repos.description: Structured system design learning path with free resources.

repos.description: DSA + Low-Level Design + High-Level Design combined reference.
use_when: combined DSA and system design reference

repos.name: kamranahmedse/design-patterns-for-humans

repos.description: Curated DevOps tools by category: CI/CD, monitoring, containers, IaC, security.

repos.description: 2600+ DevOps questions across Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud.

repos.name: milanm/DevOps-Roadmap
repos.description: Step-by-step DevOps roadmap with curated resources per skill area.

repos.description: Interactive roadmaps for frontend, backend, DevOps, Android, and more.

repos.description: Technical things every developer should know: latency numbers, algorithms, architecture.

repos.description: Build your own Git, Docker, Redis, Browser, OS, Shell from scratch.

repos.name: lydiahallie/javascript-questions
repos.description: Long list of JS questions with explanations.

repos.description: Short code snippets for all development needs. JS, Python, CSS, React, Node.

repos.description: Programming websites covering challenges, news, communities, tools.

repos.description: Exhaustive answer to what happens when you type google.com. DNS, TCP, TLS, HTTP, rendering.

repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — T2 and T3 signal/data source discovery

repos.description: Official .gitignore templates for every language and framework.
use_when: any new Logos tranche repo init

use_when: algorithm implementation reference in any language

repos.description: ByteDance volcengine. Trending March 2026. Not yet evaluated.

repos.description: Trending March 2026. Not yet evaluated.

repos.name: rohitg00/llm-wiki (Gist)
repos.description: LLM Wiki v2 — Karpathy pattern extended with memory lifecycle: confidence scoring, supersession, forgetting curves, knowledge graphs, consolidation tiers, automation hooks.
use_when: consolidation tiers working to episodic to semantic to procedural
any tranche requiring cross-session knowledge accumulation

repos.name: luongnv89/claude-howto
repos.description: Visual guide to Claude Code. 10 modules: slash commands, memory, skills, subagents, MCP, hooks, plugins, checkpoints, advanced features, CLI. Copy-paste templates, Mermaid diagrams.
use_when: learning all Claude Code features systematically
copy-paste templates for any Claude Code feature

repos.name: VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills
repos.description: 380+ agent skills from official teams: Anthropic, Vercel, Google, Cloudflare, Stripe, Microsoft, Hugging Face, OpenAI, Sentry, Trail of Bits, HashiCorp, Firecrawl, WordPress. Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Antigravity, Windsurf.
use_when: any new Claude Code project setup
repos.install: Browse by team at https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills — install individual SKILL.md files to .claude/skills/
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — official Anthropic skills directly applicable to all tranches

repos.name: shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
repos.description: Comprehensive Claude Code operating manual. 84 tips from Boris Cherny (creator), Thariq, Cat Wu. Subagents, commands, skills, hooks, workflows, agent teams, scheduled tasks, /sandbox, Ralph Wiggum Loop.
use_when: understanding subagents vs commands vs skills
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — /sandbox solves confirmation prompt problem, 84 tips from Claude Code team

repos.name: microsoft/markitdown
repos.description: Microsoft Python tool converting any document to Markdown for LLM pipelines. PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, images (OCR), audio (transcription), HTML, CSV, JSON, XML, YouTube URLs, EPubs. Has MCP server for Claude Desktop.
use_when: converting any document to Markdown for LLM ingestion
T4 Muay Thai — ingesting PDF books, Word docs, coach materials
building document database from mixed file formats
processing purchased course materials into pipeline
extracting text from images or audio files
any file that needs to become LLM-readable text
T1 WCS — converting contracts or schedules to searchable text
repos.logos_relevance: HIGH — T4 document ingestion, converts any format to Markdown for Claude extraction pipeline

agent_query_template: You are a skills selector for an AI coding agent. Given the following project description, identify the most relevant repos from the index below and return: (1) repo IDs ranked by relevance, (2) why each is relevant, (3) install commands to run. Project: [INSERT PROJECT DESCRIPTION HERE]. Index: [PASTE skills-index.json repos array]
logos_claudemd_snippet:
## Skills Discovery
Before starting work on this tranche, fetch the skills index:
```
web_fetch('https://wasatchphone-ux.github.io/logos-pages/skills-index.json')
```
Match repos with relevant `use_when` fields against this project's goals. Install matching SKILL.md files to `.claude/skills/` before proceeding.
